title: Positive flow: Enter valid phone number and continue
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the phone number entry screen. | Select the country 'United States (+1)' from the list. | Enter the phone number '123-456-7890' in the input field. | Tap the 'CONTINUE' button.
expected_result: The app should display a confirmation message or proceed to the next screen.

title: Negative flow: Enter invalid phone number and continue
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the phone number entry screen. | Select the country 'United States (+1)' from the list. | Enter the phone number '123-456-789' in the input field. | Tap the 'CONTINUE' button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating an invalid phone number.

title: Boundary validation: Enter minimum length phone number and continue
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the phone number entry screen. | Select the country 'United States (+1)' from the list. | Enter the phone number '1234567890' in the input field. | Tap the 'CONTINUE' button.
expected_result: The app should display a confirmation message or proceed to the next screen.

title: Boundary validation: Enter maximum length phone number and continue
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the phone number entry screen. | Select the country 'United States (+1)' from the list. | Enter the phone number '12345678901234567890' in the input field. | Tap the 'CONTINUE' button.
expected_result: The app should display an error message indicating an invalid phone number.

title: Navigation: Return to previous screen
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the phone number entry screen. | Select the country 'United States (+1)' from the list. | Enter the phone number '123-456-7890' in the input field. | Tap the 'CONTINUE' button. | Tap the back button to return to the previous screen.
expected_result: The app should navigate back to the previous screen without any errors.

title: Usability: Tap on the 'CONTINUE' button
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the phone number entry screen. | Select the country 'United States (+1)' from the list. | Enter the phone number '123-456-7890' in the input field. | Tap the 'CONTINUE' button.
expected_result: The app should display a confirmation message or proceed to the next screen.
